array.string: export PYTHONPATH=/Users/sidhantamonkar/Documents/Projects/sid-trading-lab/src:$PYTHONPATH; cd /Users/sidhantamonkar/Documents/Projects/sid-trading-lab; /Users/sidhantamonkar/Documents/Projects/sid-trading-lab/.venv/bin/python3 -m trading_lab.cli weekly-report --date today; /Users/sidhantamonkar/Documents/Projects/sid-trading-lab/.venv/bin/python3 -m trading_lab.cli strategy-comparison --ticker AAPL --data-source static; /Users/sidhantamonkar/Documents/Projects/sid-trading-lab/.venv/bin/python3 -m trading_lab.cli agent-reviews --week current
